title: This MCP makes Hermes Agent 10x more powerful
summary: Apify MCP Connectors are integrations that enhance the Hermes Agent by providing expanded capabilities. The connectors reportedly improve agent performance significantly when used together.
writeup: The video covers connecting the Hermes Agent to Apify MCP Connectors, integrations built on the Model Context Protocol that add capabilities such as browser automation. It matters because MCP provides a standard way to extend an agent with external tools rather than custom one-off wiring. The key takeaway: the connectors expand what Hermes can do and, per the summary, improve agent performance when used together.
